task_specific_assessments.instructional_content: Complete Roeder's knot tutorial from introduction to final formation

confidence_rationale: Clear instructional video with educational branding and step-by-step knot tying demonstration. Not a performance assessment.
cannot_determine: Performance metrics - this is educational content, not a task performance
technique_summary: Comprehensive instructional demonstration of Roeder's knot technique with clear verbal and visual guidance.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper suture end positioning (shorter left, longer right)
Wind formation while maintaining limb control
verbal_cues: Keep the shorter on the left side and the longer on the right side
Take one hitch with longer one
Take one wind keeping both the limbs together
Now we can take a half lock with the longer end
The knot has 1 hitch 3 winds and lock
common_errors_addressed: Loss of thread control during winding
